concept: Joyful / Full of Joy / Experiencing Deep Happiness
description: Feeling, expressing, or causing great pleasure and happiness. 'Loshi' names the quality of deep gladness—not mere pleasure but the wholehearted experience of joy.
sound_symbolism: The word radiates gladness. 'Lo' flows with ease, happiness moving. Then 'shi' /ʃi/ lifts with lightness, joy complete.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'loshi nila' (joyful day). Related to 'wiroa' (hopeful) but emphasizes present happiness rather than anticipated good.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Sympathetic joy (mudita) celebrates others' happiness—joy that multiplies through sharing.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Joyful art celebrates life's beauty—forms that express delight in existence.
